---
title: "Felicia Mary Frances Skene"
---

## Felicia Mary Frances Skene

**Dates:** (1821-1899)

### Description

novelist, social reformer

### Biography

She was editor of the <i>Churchman\'s Companion</i> from 1863, and not therefore CMY\'s correspondent in 1852.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 12th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
